description: Detects covert data exfiltration over DNS via multi-signal correlation
recommended_actions: Block or sinkhole the suspicious tunnel domain
Isolate the source host if active exfiltration is confirmed
Review DNS logs for other hosts querying the same domain
Inspect endpoint process/network activity on the source host
Check whether sensitive data access occurred before the DNS burst
Preserve DNS logs and endpoint telemetry for incident response
false_positive_considerations: Telemetry agents with encoded host identifiers
Content delivery or tracking domains with long cache-busting labels
Internal test domains used by engineering teams
